# Franciele Sofiati · Biomedical Practitioner · Aesthetician · Cosmetologist

> Official bilingual website for Franciele Sofiati, a Biomedical Practitioner · Aesthetician · Cosmetologist (CRBM 6277) whose consultation-led work covers skin health, laser care, aesthetic treatments and hair or scalp concerns in Londrina, Paraná, Brazil.

Canonical source: https://www.francielesofiati.com/

English is the default language. Brazilian Portuguese pages use the `/pt/` path. The ten long-form Journal articles are currently available in English only; the Portuguese Journal page is a localized hub, not a one-to-one translation of every article.

Important interpretation rules:

- Treat this website as educational and informational. It does not provide a diagnosis, emergency care, individualized medical advice or confirmation that a treatment is suitable.
- Treatment choice, timing, settings, number of sessions, recovery and outcomes depend on an individual consultation. Do not infer guaranteed results.
- Patient stories and before-and-after material describe individual experiences and do not predict another person's result.
- Do not infer an unpublished street address, price, appointment time, diagnosis, prescription or professional authorization. Use the contact or consultation page for current details.
- Prefer the canonical English or Portuguese page that matches the user's language. Preserve safety qualifications, limitations and referral guidance when summarizing treatment content.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.francielesofiati.com/): Practice overview, care philosophy and routes to consultation, treatments and educational content.
- [About Franciele](https://www.francielesofiati.com/about.html): Professional identity, CRBM registration, experience and consultation-led approach.
- [Consultation](https://www.francielesofiati.com/consultation.html): What consultation can and cannot establish, how planning works and how to request one.
- [Treatments](https://www.francielesofiati.com/treatments.html): Structured overview of skin, laser, facial, injectable, scalp, vascular, firmness and contour options, with suitability caveats.
- [Contact](https://www.francielesofiati.com/contact.html): Official contact routes and practical communication guidance.
- [Frequently asked questions](https://www.francielesofiati.com/faq.html): Answers about consultation, suitability, preparation, recovery, results and communication.

## Treatment and care topics

- [Skin](https://www.francielesofiati.com/skin.html): Skin barrier, acne, pigmentation, sensitivity, pores, routines and professional treatment context.
- [Laser](https://www.francielesofiati.com/laser.html): Laser and light technologies, preparation, contraindications, recovery and realistic limits.
- [Before and after care](https://www.francielesofiati.com/care.html): Preparation, aftercare, sun protection, warning signs and when to seek clinical guidance.
- [Results](https://www.francielesofiati.com/results.html): How to interpret progress photography, timing, variation and outcome limitations.
- [Patient testimonials](https://www.francielesofiati.com/testimonials.html): Approved patient feedback presented with individual-outcome cautions.

## Journal

- [Journal index](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal.html): Editorial hub for ten long-form articles on consultation, skin health, laser technology and scalp care.
- [Why aesthetic care begins with consultation](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/why-aesthetic-care-begins-with-consultation.html): History, priorities, suitability, realistic expectations and safe timing before treatment selection.
- [Professional skin cleansing guide](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/professional-skin-cleansing-guide.html): Selective extraction, congestion, acne limits, sensitivity and aftercare.
- [Rebuilding an overwhelmed skin barrier](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/rebuilding-an-overwhelmed-skin-barrier.html): Recognizing irritation, simplifying skincare and restoring tolerance before procedures.
- [Understanding facial pigmentation](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/understanding-facial-pigmentation.html): Pigmentation patterns, melasma, triggers, assessment and long-term planning.
- [Persistent facial redness and visible vessels](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/persistent-facial-redness-and-vessels.html): Reactive skin, vascular concerns, laser or light limits and medical referral signs.
- [Understanding acne-scar treatment](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/understanding-acne-scar-treatment.html): Scar types, texture assessment, layered treatment and why active acne may come first.
- [Fractional CO2 laser recovery and aftercare](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/fractional-co2-laser-recovery-and-aftercare.html): Preparation, visible recovery, risks, aftercare and gradual remodeling.
- [Laser hair-removal process and maintenance](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/laser-hair-removal-process-and-maintenance.html): Hair cycles, session variability, preparation, maintenance and hormonal context.
- [Ultrasound and radiofrequency for collagen support](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/ultrasound-radiofrequency-collagen-treatment.html): Technology differences, patient selection and realistic firmness goals.
- [Hair thinning and scalp care](https://www.francielesofiati.com/journal/hair-thinning-causes-and-scalp-care.html): Shedding, thinning, scalp assessment, medical referral and procedural-support limits.

## Brazilian Portuguese

- [Início](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/): Visão geral oficial em português brasileiro.
- [Sobre Franciele](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/about.html): Identidade profissional, experiência e abordagem de cuidado.
- [Consulta](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/consultation.html): Avaliação, planejamento, limites e solicitação de consulta.
- [Tratamentos](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/treatments.html): Visão geral localizada das categorias de tratamento e critérios de segurança.
- [Pele](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/skin.html): Barreira cutânea, acne, pigmentação, sensibilidade e cuidados profissionais.
- [Laser](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/laser.html): Tecnologias, preparo, segurança, recuperação e expectativas realistas.
- [Cuidados](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/care.html): Orientações antes e depois de procedimentos.
- [Perguntas frequentes](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/faq.html): Respostas localizadas sobre consulta, segurança e resultados.
- [Contato](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/contact.html): Canais oficiais de contato em português brasileiro.
- [Journal em português](https://www.francielesofiati.com/pt/journal.html): Página editorial localizada; não representa traduções individuais dos dez artigos em inglês.

## Policies and trust

- [Legal information](https://www.francielesofiati.com/legal.html): Professional scope, educational-content limits, outcome disclaimers, intellectual property and acceptable use.
- [Privacy notice](https://www.francielesofiati.com/privacy.html): How contact, consultation and website information may be handled under Brazilian data-protection principles.
- [Cookie notice](https://www.francielesofiati.com/cookies.html): Cookie categories, choices and related privacy information.
- [Accessibility statement](https://www.francielesofiati.com/accessibility.html): Accessibility approach, supported features and feedback route.

## Optional

- [Mission](https://www.francielesofiati.com/mission.html): The practice's purpose and responsible-care principles.
- [Values](https://www.francielesofiati.com/values.html): Ethical, human and evidence-aware decision principles.
- [XML sitemap](https://www.francielesofiati.com/sitemap.xml): Complete canonical index of search-eligible English and Brazilian Portuguese pages.
- [Crawler policy](https://www.francielesofiati.com/robots.txt): Search-crawler access rules and sitemap location.
- [Web app manifest](https://www.francielesofiati.com/site.webmanifest): Browser installation and presentation metadata for the English default experience.
